source: Tears of Steel (© Blender Foundation, CC BY 3.0 — mango.blender.org)
note: Representative excerpt of video-studio scene analysis. Boundaries + timecodes are the analyzer's real output for this film (104 scenes total); the descriptions were written by Claude viewing each scene's extracted frame (the default --describe none flow).

scenes.description: Two young people face off on an arched Amsterdam canal bridge with black wrought-iron railings — a dark-haired young man in a leather jacket and graphic tee, and an auburn-haired woman in a blue-and-black athletic jacket whose hand is thrown up mid-gesture. Leafy summer trees and brick canal houses frame a tense, animated conversation in bright daylight.

Extreme close-up of a surgeon wearing a multi-lens optical loupe over one eye, leaning in over an exposed human brain on a tray and working it with fine instruments. Magenta surgical light and a tangle of tubing wrap the scene in a clinical, unsettling sci-fi-medical mood.

A makeshift rooftop hideout in cool blue light: a white-haired, bearded old man rests on layered bedding beside a guttering candle and a folded newspaper, while behind him a figure lies prone behind a sniper rifle, watching out over the balustrade. A quiet, watchful lull in a city under siege.

The dark-haired young man, now in a blue-and-yellow leather jacket over a printed shirt, walks in profile along a tree-lined Amsterdam canal past an orange directional sign and a low bridge. An unhurried daytime establishing shot of the city.

The interior of a grand old cathedral reclaimed by nature — a towering baroque pipe organ and stone columns draped in green ivy, lit in moody blue. A lone figure in dark clothing hangs mid-air at the center, dwarfed by the overgrown architecture.

Tight close-up of a stern man's face fitted with an elaborate cybernetic eyepiece — stacked camera lenses over his right eye and a glowing red heads-up readout. Warm key light and red cabling behind him sell a hardened, augmented operative.

A curly-haired man in glasses and a hooded jacket hunches over a workbench under a desk lamp, his face washed by translucent floating holographic UI panels in green, blue and pink — a technician absorbed in a heads-up interface.

A shaggy-haired young man in a white protective coverall, sunglasses slung on his chest, grips a complex white robotic-arm assembly inside the cavernous ribbed interior of a giant machine. Harsh industrial light; a tense moment deep inside the mech.

The aftermath: a man sits slumped atop an enormous mountain of mangled robot wreckage, cradled by twisted metal limbs under a hazy, dramatic sky — the emotional climax, exhaustion and loss amid the debris of the battle.
